title: Supply Chain Manager - Panalpina India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Panalpina India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
